headline: TransDigm (TDG) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company TransDigm (NYSE:TDG) jumped 4.2% in the afternoon session after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, pausing a conflict that had sent equity prices reeling.

headline: Why GE Aerospace Stock Is Having Its Best Day In Nearly a Year
summary: Commercial aerospace stocks are jumping in relief to President Donald Trump’s cease-fire announcement.

headline: Shares of aerospace and defense companies are trading higher as investors respond to the US-Iran ceasefire deal and President Trump's 15‑point cooperation plan, easing geopolitical tensions and boosting risk appetite.
